texto: What really interests me is how a woman who has had a bad experience with a man comes through it and gets a new life. I feel you have to be positive. You have to say, 'Look, okay, he's ditched you, but there's life after.'
explicacao: Orientação direta de Kate O'Mara sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “What really interests me is how a woman who has had a bad experience with a man comes through it …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, experience, man, útil em momentos de experience e man.
